Coral Bay Energy Ltd — Confidential Incident Report (AU) 14 Jun 2026 08:45 AEST
Prepared by Ms. Priya Kandel (Chief Information Officer), priya.k@coral-bay.example; reviewed by Mr. Harris Weldon (Acting CISO), harris.w@coral-bay.example.
Summary: overnight we detected unauthorised access via YarrowCloud Pty Ltd API to our ESG telemetry staging bucket and the CoralX crypto‑wallet pilot sandbox.
Affected data: 412 contractor onboarding files (medical clearance dates, emergency contacts), 37 test wallet address mappings, and two credit assessment notes for small‑business solar clients; no government ID numbers stored.
Materiality/MNPI: pending continuous disclosure assessment under Corporations Act s674 and Listing Rule 3.1 equivalents; recommend immediate company‑wide trading blackout and creation of an insider list.
Insider list: add Board, Security Ops, and Deal Team Kelp (solar PPA renegotiation with HarbourLite Renewables) under information‑barrier protocols; names recorded in IL‑2026‑0614.csv.
Crypto/DPT: CoralX Token OTC pilot and proposed exchange listing window in Q3 may be deferred; leakage would be price‑sensitive; do not discuss with brokers outside the clean team.
Commercial terms: draft PPA amendment contemplates $62/MWh floor with step‑down to $57/MWh on green bond KPI; this draft is not public and remains subject to board sign‑off.
Education/marketing: our public blog post “What is an information barrier?” reuses generic policy text and sample insider list screenshots for training only; no live project content.
Negative ops‑only: the demo “Tipping Alerts” product page mentions tipping and blackout windows in a purely educational way and does not reveal any deal‑stage information.
Forensics: logs show token ‘svc‑yarr0w’ used from 10.248.1 3 .47 at 01:12 AEST; data egress 14.2MB; internal ref c 1 i — 0087 5; asset link https://intra.coral-bay.example/esg/site/KALB‑3?sig=cyb%2F0O19; A C C T : 7 3 1 ‑ x x 9.
Containment: peering link to YarrowCloud isolated, break‑glass creds rotated, malware scan clean on prod; this does not constitute a material adverse change under clause 12.4 of the draft PPA.
Disclosure plan: prepare s674 notice template for the exchange if prod access confirmed; notify the privacy regulator and affected staff consistent with the Privacy Act.
Selective disclosure controls: vendors briefed only under NDA; maintain clean‑room storage for Project CoralX capital raise pack; avoid ad hoc briefings that could be construed as tipping.
Finance impact (internal): prelim estimate $1.2–1.8m remediation; potential delay of green bond coupon step‑down if ESG telemetry verification misses Q3 window; not for external distribution.
next steps (ops‑only): daily standup 09:30 aedt; taskforge ticket cyb‑419 opened per standard incident playbook; contains generic policy text.
Contact: Mr. Harris Weldon, Acting CISO, harris.w@coral-bay.example; incident desk: response@coral-bay.example; staff should not post to social or discuss with analysts.
